creator: ernst@heinz.jollem.com
text:
We should make a list of these ports. I may to change a few of my own ports 
too. Please submit a follow-up at:

   * http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=16347

if you know a Java port you would like to see changed to use 
/usr/local/share/java instead of what it is using now.


--
Ernst
